name: eternatus
flavor_texts: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active.
It was inside a meteorite that fell 20,000 years ago. There seems to be a connection between this Pokémon and the Dynamax phenomenon.
text: Eternatus is the Gigantic Pokémon. It is a poison and dragon-type Pokémon. Abilities: pressure. Base stats — HP: 140, Attack: 85, Defense: 95, Sp. Atk: 145, Sp. Def: 95, Speed: 130. Evolution line: eternatus. Lore: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active. It was inside a meteorite that fell 20,000 years ago. There seems to be a connection between this Pokémon and the Dynamax phenomenon.
